description_long: This house features a single-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, with a section of stone cladding adding visual interest near the front entrance. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by two white columns, leading up to a set of steps and a double front door. Windows are modest in size and asymmetrically placed, with one large window visible on the front and minimal fenestration on the other sides. The house sits on a slightly raised foundation with a paved walkway and porch area. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A single-story house with a hip roof, light gray walls, stone accent, and a covered front porch supported by columns. The design is simple, with asymmetrical windows and a modest entryway.
description_view_0: The rear and one side of the house are visible, showing plain light gray walls, the hip roof, and the covered porch extending to the right.
description_view_1: The front of the house is shown, featuring the main entryway with steps, a double door, stone accent wall, a large window, and two supporting columns under the porch roof.
description_view_2: The opposite rear and side are visible, highlighting the extended porch area, a supporting column, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: A side and partial rear view, showing the plain wall, the hip roof, and the edge of the porch with a single column.
attribute_entryway_design: Double front door with steps, covered porch supported by two columns, stone accent wall, and a simple overhang.
